title: Statistical and High Performance Computing

prerequisites.text: Acceptance into the Master's course in Data Science or quantitative background deemed sufficient by Head of Department.

outline: This course aims to provide students with a foundation in statistical computing for data science. The course is divided into three sections: (1) Basic Programming — how to write computer programs to analyse data with the R Language and Environment for Statistical Computing; (2) High Performance Computing — running jobs in parallel on a remote computer cluster using a Linux command prompt; (3) Simulation and Optimisation — fundamental principles and uses of simulation and optimisation.
